question_intent: Average points scored by constructors in races where the fastest lap was set by a driver from Brazil

plan.question_intent: Average points scored by constructors in races where the fastest lap was set by a driver from Brazil
plan.detail_query: SELECT c.name AS constructor_name, r.year AS race_year, r.name AS race_name, cr.points AS constructor_points FROM constructors c JOIN constructorresults cr ON c.constructorid = cr.constructorid JOIN races r ON cr.raceid = r.raceid JOIN results res ON r.raceid = res.raceid JOIN drivers d ON res.driverid = d.driverid WHERE d.nationality = 'Brazilian' AND res.fastestlap = 1

blocks.name: leaf_1
blocks.select_clause: SELECT c.name AS constructor_name, r.year AS race_year, r.name AS race_name, cr.points AS constructor_points
join_clauses: JOIN constructorresults cr ON c.constructorid = cr.constructorid
JOIN races r ON cr.raceid = r.raceid
JOIN results res ON r.raceid = res.raceid
JOIN drivers d ON res.driverid = d.driverid

steps.clause: JOIN constructorresults cr ON c.constructorid = cr.constructorid
steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM constructors c
JOIN constructorresults cr ON c.constructorid = cr.constructorid
LIMIT 5

steps.clause: JOIN races r ON cr.raceid = r.raceid
steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM constructors c
JOIN constructorresults cr ON c.constructorid = cr.constructorid
JOIN races r ON cr.raceid = r.raceid
LIMIT 5

steps.clause: JOIN results res ON r.raceid = res.raceid
steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM constructors c
JOIN constructorresults cr ON c.constructorid = cr.constructorid
JOIN races r ON cr.raceid = r.raceid
JOIN results res ON r.raceid = res.raceid
LIMIT 5

steps.clause: JOIN drivers d ON res.driverid = d.driverid
steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM constructors c
JOIN constructorresults cr ON c.constructorid = cr.constructorid
JOIN races r ON cr.raceid = r.raceid
JOIN results res ON r.raceid = res.raceid
JOIN drivers d ON res.driverid = d.driverid
LIMIT 5

SELECT *
FROM constructors c
JOIN constructorresults cr ON c.constructorid = cr.constructorid
JOIN races r ON cr.raceid = r.raceid
JOIN results res ON r.raceid = res.raceid
JOIN drivers d ON res.driverid = d.driverid
WHERE (d.nationality = 'Brazilian')
LIMIT 5

SELECT *
FROM constructors c
JOIN constructorresults cr ON c.constructorid = cr.constructorid
JOIN races r ON cr.raceid = r.raceid
JOIN results res ON r.raceid = res.raceid
JOIN drivers d ON res.driverid = d.driverid
WHERE (d.nationality = 'Brazilian') AND (res.fastestlap = 1)
LIMIT 5

SELECT *
FROM constructors c
JOIN constructorresults cr ON c.constructorid = cr.constructorid
JOIN races r ON cr.raceid = r.raceid
JOIN results res ON r.raceid = res.raceid
JOIN drivers d ON res.driverid = d.driverid
WHERE (d.nationality = 'Brazilian') AND (res.position = 1)
LIMIT 5

SELECT *
FROM constructors c
JOIN constructorresults cr ON c.constructorid = cr.constructorid
JOIN races r ON cr.raceid = r.raceid
JOIN results res ON r.raceid = res.raceid
JOIN drivers d ON res.driverid = d.driverid
WHERE (d.nationality = 'Brazilian') AND (res.positionorder = 1)
LIMIT 5

SELECT *
FROM constructors c
JOIN constructorresults cr ON c.constructorid = cr.constructorid
JOIN races r ON cr.raceid = r.raceid
JOIN results res ON r.raceid = res.raceid
JOIN drivers d ON res.driverid = d.driverid
WHERE (d.nationality = 'Brazilian') AND (res.positionorder >= 1)
LIMIT 5

SELECT c.name AS constructor_name, r.year AS race_year, r.name AS race_name, cr.points AS constructor_points
FROM constructors c
JOIN constructorresults cr ON c.constructorid = cr.constructorid
JOIN races r ON cr.raceid = r.raceid
JOIN results res ON r.raceid = res.raceid
JOIN drivers d ON res.driverid = d.driverid
WHERE (d.nationality = 'Brazilian') AND (res.positionorder >= 1)

build_logs.notes: This block calculates the average points scored by constructors in races where the fastest lap was set by a Brazilian driver

steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM (SELECT c.name AS constructor_name, r.year AS race_year, r.name AS race_name, cr.points AS constructor_points
FROM constructors c
JOIN constructorresults cr ON c.constructorid = cr.constructorid
JOIN races r ON cr.raceid = r.raceid
JOIN results res ON r.raceid = res.raceid
JOIN drivers d ON res.driverid = d.driverid
WHERE (d.nationality = 'Brazilian') AND (res.positionorder >= 1)) AS leaf_1
LIMIT 5

SELECT AVG(constructor_points) AS average_points
FROM (SELECT c.name AS constructor_name, r.year AS race_year, r.name AS race_name, cr.points AS constructor_points
FROM constructors c
JOIN constructorresults cr ON c.constructorid = cr.constructorid
JOIN races r ON cr.raceid = r.raceid
JOIN results res ON r.raceid = res.raceid
JOIN drivers d ON res.driverid = d.driverid
WHERE (d.nationality = 'Brazilian') AND (res.positionorder >= 1)) AS leaf_1

nearest.sql:
SELECT AVG(leaf_1.avg_points) AS average_points
FROM (SELECT d.driverid, d.forename, d.surname, c.name AS constructor_name, AVG(r.points) AS avg_points
FROM drivers AS d
JOIN results AS r ON d.driverid = r.driverid
JOIN constructors AS c ON r.constructorid = c.constructorid
JOIN races AS ra ON r.raceid = ra.raceid
JOIN target AS t ON d.driverid = t.driverid AND t.win = 1
WHERE (c.nationality = 'British') AND (t.win = 1)
GROUP BY d.driverid, d.forename, d.surname, c.name
HAVING (COUNT(t.win) >= 1)) AS leaf_1

question: What is the average number of points scored by constructors in races where at least one Brazilian driver finished in first place or higher?
